briefdescription.para: General catch-all representation for internal or undocumented custom hooks.
Unstable low-level hooks and internal customization switches.

detaileddescription.para:
Volatile API / No Stability Guarantees: These internal macros and low-level hooks are subject to change or complete removal without notice in future versions. Use them at your own risk.
All MPTAR_CUSTOM_* hooks are related to internal functions inside minipaxtar.c. Unless explicitly listed under Stable Compile-Time Options, these custom functions are considered internal and carry no stability guarantees.
